knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-028-ESG-Sustainability Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: ESG-015 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: ESG-001 Approved ESG policy | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Approved ESG policy | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-002 Materiality assessment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Materiality assessment | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-003 Data source certification | Governance | Require documented compliance: Data source certification | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-004 Metric methodology approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Metric methodology approval | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-005 Scope boundary | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Scope boundary | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-006 Target approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Target approval | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-007 Greenwashing prevention | Governance | Require documented compliance: Greenwashing prevention | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-008 Disclosure review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Disclosure review | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-009 Supplier ESG data | Governance | Require documented compliance: Supplier ESG data | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-010 Climate scenario linkage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Climate scenario linkage | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-011 Stewardship evidence | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Stewardship evidence | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-012 Conflict disclosure | Governance | Require documented compliance: Conflict disclosure | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-013 Assurance readiness | Governance | Require documented compliance: Assurance readiness | Critical | ESG Officer. ESG-014 AI publication prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI publication prohibition | Critical | AI Governance. ESG-015 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | Critical | Security. ESG-016 Data lineage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Data lineage | High | ESG Officer. ESG-017 Methodology versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Methodology versioning | High | ESG Officer. ESG-018 Target tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Target tracking | High | ESG Officer. ESG-019 Exception governance | Governance | Require documented compliance: Exception governance | High | ESG Officer. ESG-020 Board escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | High | ESG Officer. ESG-021 Retention | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Retention | High | ESG Officer. ESG-022 Access control | Governance | Require documented compliance: Access control | High | ESG Officer. ESG-023 Outcome review | Governance | Require documented compliance: Outcome review | High | ESG Officer. ESG-024 External assurance evidence | Evidence | Require documented evidence: External assurance evidence | High | ESG Officer. ESG-025 Regulatory alignment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Regulatory alignment | High | ESG Officer.
